claim_notes: HOODIE is tied with all baselines on every sweep, so the paper claim is not reproduced.
paper_claim_summary: Average delay should stay lower than baselines as arrival probability increases; MLEO should fall behind HOODIE at high load.

claim_notes: Only a directional timeout effect is visible; policy separation is still absent.
